settings.heading: Premium dinners, simplified into a smooth weekly flow
settings.text: From choosing your plan to revealing a surprise country experience at home, ROAMSOME is designed to feel effortless, premium and genuinely exciting.

settings.heading: Three smooth steps from signup to supper
settings.text: Choose your route, receive your box, then cook with confidence.

settings.title: 1. Pick a journey
settings.text: Choose 2, 3 or 5 meals per week and select the serving size that fits your household. We take care of the destination curation for you.

settings.title: 2. Receive your box
settings.text: Your ingredients arrive chilled, organised and portioned for a cleaner, smoother cooking experience.

settings.title: 3. Cook with confidence
settings.text: Use chef-led recipe cards, destination notes and simple finishing tips to create standout dinners at home.

settings.title: Built for premium quality on a real-life schedule
settings.item_4: Simple skips and pauses before cut-off

settings.title: Flexible by design
settings.item_1: Swap plans based on your week
